headline: Evergy begins construction on 710 MW high-efficiency natural gas plant
summary: KANSAS CITY - Evergy, Inc. today celebrated the start of construction on a new 710-megawatt combined-cycle natural gas plant in Sumner County, Kan.The company also announced the plant, which is...
